title: ThreatEvent
description: Normalized threat event schema — the single contract between all sensor adapters and the RACK FP AI engine. Every sensor adapter (EchoGuard, McQ RANGER, Bosch PTZ, Bulzi z.SCOUT, DFT fiber, JCEW/Drak) must produce events conforming to this schema.

sensor_id.description: Unique identifier for the reporting sensor instance (e.g., 'ECHODYNE-01', 'MCQ-RANGER-NORTH').

sensor_type.description: Canonical sensor type producing this event.

track_id.description: Sensor-assigned track identifier. Persistent across updates for the same tracked object.

bearing_deg.description: Bearing from sensor to target in degrees true north (0-360).

range_m.description: Slant range from sensor to target in meters.

altitude_m_agl.description: Target altitude above ground level in meters. Negative values indicate subsurface (tunnel). Ground targets should be 0-2m.

velocity_mps.description: Target ground speed in meters per second.

heading_deg.description: Target heading/course in degrees true north.

radar_cross_section_m2.description: Radar cross section in square meters. 0.0 for non-radar sensors. EchoGuard spec ranges: sUAS 0.001-0.05, personnel 0.5-1.5, vehicle 5-100, fixed-wing 1-100.

track_age_s.description: Duration in seconds since the track was first established.

track_confidence_0_1.description: Sensor-reported track confidence (0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = maximum). Used for fusion weighting.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the event (e.g., '2026-06-15T14:30:00.000Z').

raw_payload.description: Original sensor payload preserved verbatim. Schema is sensor-specific — the AI engine treats this as opaque metadata for debugging and audit.

threat_class.description: AI-assigned or ground-truth threat classification label. Required for training data; may be null in live inference.

threat_score.description: AI-computed threat probability score (0.0 = benign, 1.0 = confirmed hostile). Set by the classification model during inference.

lat.description: WGS-84 latitude of the target in decimal degrees.

lon.description: WGS-84 longitude of the target in decimal degrees.

elevation_deg.description: Elevation angle from sensor to target in degrees. Positive = above horizon.

cot_type.description: Cursor on Target type code for TAK integration (e.g., 'a-h-A-M-F-Q' for hostile UAS).

sensor_modality.description: Primary sensing modality that produced this event.

detection_zone.description: Named defensive zone or sector where detection occurred (e.g., 'NORTH-PERIMETER', 'GATE-1').

frequency_mhz.description: RF frequency in MHz (for RF-based sensors like Bulzi z.SCOUT, JCEW/Drak). 0 for non-RF sensors.

signal_strength_dbm.description: Signal strength in dBm (for RF-based sensors). Null for non-RF sensors.
